## Quality Check

If your PR includes a prompt, template, or example artifact, confirm the following:

- [ ] Epics follow the 10-section canonical format
- [ ] User stories use In order to / As a / I want to / So that with all required sections
- [ ] Acceptance Criteria are declarative checklists — no Given/When/Then
- [ ] BDD Scenarios include all four types: Happy Path, Validation, Edge Case, Failure Handling
- [ ] No Implementation Notes, Technical Design, or Pseudocode in any story or epic
- [ ] Personas are specific roles with context — not "As a user"
- [ ] Outcomes are measurable — not "so that it works"

---

## Notes for the Reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: tradeoffs, open questions, related issues -->
